_comment: Universal function-calling schema for mythosforge-skill-scaffold. openai = OpenAI / Bankr LLM Gateway / Surplus / Codex / Cursor. anthropic = Claude Messages API tool-use. Parameters identical; only the envelope differs.

description.description: One-line description of the new skill.

tool_name.description: Function name for the generated tool-schema.json (default: name with hyphens as underscores).

model_slug.description: Replicate model the generated skeleton drives.

out.description: Parent dir for the new skill.

function.name: mythosforge_skill_scaffold
function.description: Generate a new MythosForge skill folder on the locked universal template (cross-agent CLI + docs + schemas). Writes files locally and returns the new skill directory. No API key required.

out.description: Parent dir for the new skill.

anthropic.name: mythosforge_skill_scaffold
anthropic.description: Generate a new MythosForge skill folder on the locked universal template (cross-agent CLI + docs + schemas). Writes files locally and returns the new skill directory. No API key required.

out.description: Parent dir for the new skill.

invocation.note: When the model emits a tool call, the host maps the args to this shell command and runs it:
invocation.returns: A JSON line: { ok, name, dir, files }. Feed `dir` back to the model as the tool result.
